description: Artifact writer contract. Defines how execution artifacts are collected, hashed, and written into the PR branch of the target repository. Last stage before certification.

step_1_collect.action: Gather all artifacts from completed execution.
sources: Modified files from mounted repo (diff against base branch).

step_2_hash.action: Compute SHA-256 hash of all required artifacts.
step_2_hash.method: Sort WORK_PACKET.required_artifacts alphabetically. Read each file content as raw bytes. Concatenate in sorted order. Compute SHA-256 hash.

step_3_write_certification.integrity: certification.json is the final artifact written. Modification after write invalidates signature.

step_4_write_work_packet.action: Write copy of WORK_PACKET into PR branch for traceability.

step_5_write_audit_report.action: Write audit report into PR branch for traceability.

step_6_commit.action: Create commit on PR branch with all artifacts and code changes.

artifact_manifest.cleanup: Previous .garage/ contents are replaced on each certification run. No accumulation across runs.

integrity_invariants: artifact_hash in certification.json must match recomputed hash of required_artifacts.
auditor_signature must validate against garage signing key.
No artifact may be modified after certification.json is written.
certification.json is always the last file written in the commit.
.garage/ directory is owned by the Garage. Child repos must not modify it.
